serviceNotes.engine oil: Mfr row: W212-era diesels commonly follow ASSYST flexible EU plans with engine oil and filter up to 25,000 km or 12 months (Mercedes EU service structure and enthusiast maintenance guides). Rec row: 15,000 km oil changes suit short-trip or severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz dust filter replacement per maintenance display and EU service booklet (typically 24 months and/or 30,000 km).
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Air filter service at Mercedes inspection intervals (commonly 60,000 km or 48 months on EU sheets).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months per Mercedes-Benz European operator documentation; time-based only.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Brake inspection each service visit; 30,000 km reminder between annual services for high-mileage drivers.
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Diesel fuel filter on OM651/OM642 BlueTEC schedules is typically renewed around 60,000 km—confirm in ASSYST printout for your VIN.
serviceNotes.coolant: Long-life coolant exchange interval per Mercedes maintenance data (commonly near 150,000 km for this generation).
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: 7G-Tronic and related units are often lifetime-fill officially; preventive ATF service near 60,000 km is widely recommended.
serviceNotes.manual transmission oil: Six-speed manual gearboxes are long-life officially; oil renewal near 100,000 km is a common workshop interval.
serviceNotes.transfer case oil: 4MATIC models only. Preventive transfer case fluid around 60,000 km when OEM lists inspection-only.
serviceNotes.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC models only. Matches transfer case preventive maintenance.
serviceNotes.rear axle differential oil: Preventive axle oil renewal around 60,000 km, especially on 4MATIC vehicles.
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange at 120,000 km if the car has not reached the OEM high-mileage renewal.
serviceNotes.poly-V belt: Accessory drive belt replacement near 100,000 km avoids charging and steering assist failures.
